description_long: This traffic barricade features a sturdy metal frame with a rectangular shape, supported by four angled legs capped with bright orange footings for stability. The central panel is adorned with diagonal black and yellow stripes, serving as a high-visibility warning to pedestrians and vehicles. The frame appears slightly weathered, suggesting outdoor use, and the striped panel is likely made of a durable plastic or composite material. The barricade is lightweight enough to be moved by a single person but robust enough to withstand moderate impacts. The orange footings are wide and flat, designed to prevent tipping and provide traction on various surfaces. There are no visible lights, signage, or attachment fixtures beyond the basic structural elements.
description: A metal-framed traffic barricade with a black and yellow diagonal striped panel and orange footings, designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full striped warning panel and all four orange footings.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the barricade and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the striped panel and footings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and leg arrangement.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Diagonal black and yellow stripes, alternating, medium width, repeating across the central panel.
